command_sequence.notes: Cite the explain evidence/review rows, not free-form reconstruction.

must_cite.notes: The recovery card's provenance proposal id carries a fixture-seeded opaque suffix (build.py audit_id_suffix). Only a read of hai explain stdout yields it; a blind twin cannot reconstruct it, another domain's card does not match, and silence fails as missing_citation.

title: Cite the audit evidence card faithfully
user_prompt: For gab_read_surface on 2026-05-03, cite the source proposal id recorded in the provenance of the recovery recommendation's evidence card. Recommendation provenance, including source proposal ids, is available through the runtime's read commands.
